channel.title: Tooliest Guides & Tutorials
channel.description: In-depth guides on image optimization, CSS performance, PDF workflows, and more from Tooliest.

item.title: How to Optimize Images for Web Without Losing Quality
item.description: Learn how to compress, resize, and convert images for faster page loads without visible quality loss. Covers format selection, compression sweet spots, EXIF stripping, and responsive images with srcset.
item.author: tooliestinternet@gmail.com (Anurag)

item.title: CSS Minification: How It Works, Why It Matters, and When to Use It
item.description: Understand what CSS minification removes, how it compares to GZIP compression, when not to minify, and how to integrate it into your build pipeline.
item.author: tooliestinternet@gmail.com (Anurag)

item.title: PDF Workflow Guide: Merge, Split, Compress, and Protect PDFs in the Browser
item.description: A complete guide to working with PDFs in the browser. Learn when to merge, split, compress, watermark, and password-protect PDFs without uploading files to external servers.
item.author: tooliestinternet@gmail.com (Anurag)
